smartActionBar.noInterface: No operation interface available for this topic

toast.maxNodesExceeded: Data count exceeds limit. Maximum {{maxNodes}} items allowed.
toast.invalidFormat: Please enter a valid number format (e.g. 1,2,3)
toast.emptyDataOperation: No data available. Please load or generate data first.
toast.invalidWordList: Please enter a valid word list.

outro.title: Ready?
outro.description: Before you start practicing, visit the Knowledge Station to learn the theoretical foundations of this algorithm!
outro.descriptionDataStructure: Before you start practicing, visit the Knowledge Station to learn the theoretical foundations of this data structure!

featureTour.algorithmReadyDesc: Before you start practicing, visit the Knowledge Station to learn the theory behind this algorithm!
featureTour.dataStructureReadyDesc: Before you start practicing, visit the Knowledge Station to learn the theory behind this data structure!

swapButton.title: Swap Layout
swapButton.description: Click this button to swap the left code panel and the right canvas, so you can find the learning layout that suits you best.

resizeHandle.title: Resize Panels Horizontally
resizeHandle.description: Drag the divider between the left and right panels to freely adjust the width ratio between the code panel and the visualization area.

resizeHandleV.title: Resize Panels Vertically
resizeHandleV.description: Drag the divider between the top and bottom panels to freely adjust the height ratio between the visualization canvas and the data controls panel.

canvasPanel.title: Visualization Canvas
canvasPanel.description: This is the main stage for the algorithm animation. You can zoom and pan the canvas to observe the changes at each step.

controlBar.title: Playback Controls
controlBar.description: Use play, pause, previous, and next to control the animation speed. You can also drag the progress bar to jump to any step.

codePanel.title: Code Panel
codePanel.description: The left panel shows the algorithm in pseudocode or Python — switch between them using the tabs at the top. The currently executing line is highlighted automatically as the animation plays.

inspectorPanel.title: Inspector Panel
inspectorPanel.description: The Action tab lets you add, delete, or run operations step by step. Switch to the Variable tab to watch internal variables change at each step — great for understanding what the algorithm is actually doing.

knowledgeStationButton.title: Knowledge Station
knowledgeStationButton.description: Click here to open the Knowledge Station anytime and review the theoretical foundations of this algorithm — even if you skipped the tour.

storyTab.empty: No real-world application stories available for this topic yet.
